root_cause: Phase 3C imported the quarantined Desktop packages after their manifest was written. Python regenerated imported .pyc files inside __pycache__, so those disposable cache files no longer matched their original copy-time hashes. Source .py files, native extensions, resources, and protected FOXAI files were not implicated.
fix: Exclude all __pycache__, .pyc, and .pyo files from the deterministic portable-runtime manifest and live apply plan; set PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 in diagnostics and future portable launchers; and make failure-report generation safe even when no exact plan exists.
